headline: Evercore ISI Group Maintains In-Line on Host Hotels & Resorts, Raises Price Target to $23
summary: Evercore ISI Group  analyst Duane Pfennigwerth   maintains Host Hotels & Resorts (NASDAQ:HST) with a In-Line and raises the price target from $20 to $23.
